description: Phase IV-A2 effective-law extraction for the surviving smeared-transfer sector on the frozen clustered Dirac-Kahler branch.
target_definition: stable_closed_smeared = 1 iff Stage 23.12 derived_phase_label == smeared_transfer_phase; otherwise 0 for transient mixed controls on the frozen closure lattice.

model_ledger.target_definition: stable_closed_smeared = 1 iff Stage 23.12 derived_phase_label == smeared_transfer_phase; otherwise 0 for transient mixed controls on the frozen closure lattice.
model_ledger.notes: Best single-threshold rule found on `refinement_stability_flag` with threshold `0.500000`.

model_ledger.target_definition: stable_closed_smeared = 1 iff Stage 23.12 derived_phase_label == smeared_transfer_phase; otherwise 0 for transient mixed controls on the frozen closure lattice.
model_ledger.notes: Least-squares linear score model over the accepted core observables.

model_ledger.target_definition: stable_closed_smeared = 1 iff Stage 23.12 derived_phase_label == smeared_transfer_phase; otherwise 0 for transient mixed controls on the frozen closure lattice.
model_ledger.law_expression: if phase_corridor_position <= 0.500000: stable_closed_smeared = 1 iff refinement_stability_flag <= 0.500000; else stable_closed_smeared = 1 iff refinement_stability_flag <= 0.500000
model_ledger.notes: Two-bin context-conditioned threshold rule. Phase enters only as an external selector, not as a state variable.

model_ledger.target_definition: stable_closed_smeared = 1 iff Stage 23.12 derived_phase_label == smeared_transfer_phase; otherwise 0 for transient mixed controls on the frozen closure lattice.
model_ledger.law_expression: stable_closed_smeared = 1 iff refinement_stability_flag = 1 and weak_coupling_stability_flag = 1 and reverse_stability_flag = 1
model_ledger.notes: Minimal conjunction over the binary closure-support observables.

final_interpretation: On the frozen clustered DK branch, the smeared sector admits a compact effective law built from the accepted Phase IV observable core. The selected law predicts branch-valid smeared-sector persistence/stability without reintroducing rejected braid- or asymmetry-based quantities. Phase-corridor variables remain external conditioning coordinates rather than promoted state variables.
